Copy all image files from the v07/public/ folder into this public/ folder.

Images needed: all .jpg, .png, .html, and .svg files from v07/public/

This includes:
- Hero images (hero-face.png, left-eye.png, right-eye.png)
- Hand illustrations (hand-string.png, hands.png)
- Work project images (work1.jpg, work2.jpg, work3.jpg)
- Fine Art images (art1.png through art5.png)
- About page images (me.png, about-face.png)
- Contact page image (contact-sleepy.png)
- Clip images (cliper1.png, cliper2.png)
- Any HTML or SVG visual system files
